Project P-001-CW · Classified Developer Draft

MapleStory Classic World The Parallel Blueprint

The definitive analysis — now powered by datamined WZ metadata from the actual game client (v1.1.0.0, signed April 6 2026), cross-referenced with playtest footage, developer interviews, and community analysis.

WZ Datamine Pre-Big Bang GMS Playtest Developer Interview Community Analysis
Design Philosophy

What If The Big Bang
Never Happened?

Lead developer Inkwell (Han Bil O), Head of Western Development at Nexon, conceived Classic World nearly a decade ago around the time of the original Big Bang update. After years of pitching, the project finally entered active development 2–3 years ago.

His core thesis: GMS has become too modernised. The learning curve for new players is overwhelming. Classic World exists to strip back that complexity while preserving what made old MapleStory special — community, progression satisfaction, and a slower, more intentional pace.

"If you want to play MapleStory Classic World right now, you already can. The reason I wanted to make an official Classic World was because GMS is too modernised and the learning curve for new players is way too large."

— Inkwell (Han Bil O), Head of Western Development, Nexon · Maple Con 2025

The design philosophy is Modernised Classic — not a pixel-perfect recreation of 2003 Maple, but a parallel timeline that asks the question: what would the game have become if the Big Bang never happened? A world where Inkwell and his team can still tell the stories of NPC Mani, Chief Stan, and expand lore that was left unexplored.

"Classic World is a parallel MapleStory — like Spider-Verse. What if the Black Mage didn't die? It's going to take a different path."

— Inkwell, on the divergent content timeline · Maple Con 2025

The parallel framework also means content won't follow the original GMS release timeline. Ludibrium and El Nath are in development — but when and how they arrive is driven by player feedback, not historical order.

10yrs Since idea conception
2–3yrs Active development
2025 Maple Con 20th Anniversary
Pre-BB Core design target
Datamined Intelligence

Ground Truth from the Game Files

Extracted from 3,859 files across 46 WZ archives (416 MB) and binary analysis of MapleStory_0_zucx.exe v1.1.0.0 (Themida-protected, signed April 6 2026). This is an unreleased Closed Beta / internal QA build.

📡
This is dramatically more restrictive than anyone expected. This is not a "v62" or "v83" recreation. It's closer to Beta MapleStory / GMS v.0.0x-v.28 — the earliest era of the game, rebuilt on the modern engine. Only Victoria Island. Only 2nd job. Only 4 classes. Zero cubes, zero starforce, zero flames.
4 Classes
Warrior, Magician, Bowman, Thief — no Pirates
2nd Job Max Advancement
No 3rd job, no 4th job, no Crusader/Hermit/Ranger/Priest
304 Total Maps
Victoria Island + Maple Island only — zero Ossyria
91 Monsters
Including 10 brand-new Classic World exclusives
188 NPCs
Classic Victoria Island cast + Cave Fairy NPCs
216 Scroll Types
Redesigned 4-tier system with fusion mechanic
~70 Total Skills
Beginner through 2nd job advancement only
5 Field Bosses
Mushmom, Jr. Balrog, Zombie Mushmom, Rotten Mushmom, Mano
Confirmed Present in Game Data
✅
Manual AP Allocation
Binary: SID_MSCW_ASK_STATUP_AP_AMOUNT — bulk AP allocation confirmed
✅
Free Market
FM Entrance + 11 channels in map data — player-driven economy preserved
✅
Kerning PQ
"1st Accompaniment" maps (7 stages) present in data — the #1 community request
✅
Classic Training Spots
Pig Beach, Ant Tunnel I-IV, Evil Eye Cave, Sleepywood — all confirmed
✅
Anti-Cheat Infrastructure
XignCode3, lie detector, GM stalker mode, anti-macro timers in binary
✅
Link Skills / Union Blocked
Binary flags linkSkillBlock and unionBlock active for Classic
Confirmed Absent from Game Data
❌
Zero Cubes
Not a single cube item in the entire consumable database. potentialCostTable.img exists but is a dead remnant from the shared codebase.
❌
Zero Starforce
No Star Enhancement scrolls or starforce items in any data file
❌
Zero Flames / Bonus Stats
No flame items found anywhere in the item archives
❌
No Ossyria / No Zakum
Zero Ossyria maps. Zakum exists in BossParty.img but has no map data — a dead remnant. No Horntail, no Pink Bean.
❌
No Pirates
No job 500+ skills, no Knuckle or Gun weapon data at all
❌
No 3rd/4th/5th/6th Job
Zero skill files beyond 2nd job. Binary has 6th job strings but these are engine remnants only.
Classic World vs Live MapleStory
Metric Classic World Live MapleStory
Classes450+
Job Tiers2 (1st + 2nd)6 (1st through 6th)
Total Skills~70Thousands
Monsters9110,000+
Maps30450,000+
NPCs18810,000+
Scroll Types216Thousands
Bosses~5 field bosses30+ instanced
Continents1 (Victoria)10+
Cubes0Dozens
StarforceNoCore system
Free MarketYes (11 ch)Removed (Auction House)
Potential SystemDisabledCore progression
⚠️
Modern Engine Remnants: The binary contains the full modern damage formula engine (damR, bossDamR, finalDamR), 36 boss entries in BossParty.img, potential cost tables, Reboot/Burning World definitions, crafting recipes, and RuneStone data. These are not active — they exist because Classic World shares the modern client codebase. The WZ data is stripped to only what Classic World needs.
Combat Systems

Rewiring the Physics
of Combat

Every damage formula, weapon multiplier, stat conversion, and critical system has been rebuilt from first principles for Classic World.

Damage Formula
⚔️
Base Damage Applied to Both Min & Max
BUFF — 100 base damage is now applied to both minimum and maximum attack, improving the overall attack range formula for all classes.
🗡️
Attack Power (AP) vs Weapon Attack (WA)
NEW — Two distinct offensive stats. Weapon Attack comes from buffs and potions (e.g., Rage, Power Elixir). Attack Power is drawn from weapons themselves. Ratio: 35 WA = 4 AP.
⚡
Weapon Mastery Overhaul
Starts lower at 10% (was 15%) at level 1, but now reaches 100% at max level 20 (up from 60%). More consistent, higher damage across the board.
💥
Universal Base Criticals
NEW — Every character has a 5% base crit chance and 20% crit damage. Bleed, poison, and burn DoT effects can now also crit.
🔥
Elemental Weakness Reduction
Counter-element bonus damage reduced to 25% (down from 50%), bringing elemental interactions into tighter balance.
Secondary Stat Conversions
📊
INT / DEX / LUK to Secondary Stats
2 INT → 1 Magic Attack + 4 Weapon Defense
4 DEX → 3 Accuracy + 1 Weapon Defense
3 LUK → 1 Avoidability
Weapon Multiplier Changes
Weapon Old New (Classic)
1H Sword 4.0 1.5
2H Sword 4.6 2.5
Spear (swing/stab) 3.0 / 5.0 1.5 / 3.5
Polearm (swing/stab) 5.0 / 3.0 3.5 / 1.5
Bow / Crossbow 3.4 / 3.6 2.5 / 2.5
Claw 3.6 2.5
Dagger (swing/stab) 3.6 / 3.6 1.0 / 2.0
1H Axe/Blunt (swing/stab) 4.4 / 3.2 2.0 / 1.0
2H Axe/Blunt (swing/stab) 4.8 / 3.4 3.0 / 2.0
Class Rebalancing

Class Equilibrium
Requires Fundamental Rethinking

Each archetype undergoes targeted nerfs, buffs, and mechanical reworks. The datamine confirms only 4 Explorer classes with ~70 total skills across Beginner, 1st Job, and 2nd Job. No 3rd/4th job skills exist in any data file. DATAMINED

⚔️
Warrior SKILLS CONFIRMED
Fighter (8 skills) · Page (8 skills) · Spearman (8 skills)
  • REWORK Final Attack — No longer random animation lock. Generates a "charge" that must be manually activated via a dedicated key. Single-target only.
  • NERF Hyper Body — Reduced to 30% HP bonus only (was 60% HP/MP). No more MP boost.
  • NEW Axe Mastery — Axes apply a bleed effect. Blunt weapons now apply a stun chance.
  • BUFF Threaten (Page/White Knight) — Extended range; can now slow and stun enemies, especially effective with blunt weapons.
  • BUFF Iron Body + Iron Will — These buffs now stack with each other.
🔮
Magician SKILLS CONFIRMED
F/P Wizard (6) · I/L Wizard (5) · Cleric (5)
  • CHANGE First Job Advancement — Now at Level 10 (was Level 8). Confirmed via KPQ in-game question.
  • NERF Heal — Range significantly shorter (both H and V). HP recovery reduced to 100% (was 300%). No longer a sustain machine.
  • BUFF Fire Arrow / Holy Arrow — Now hits up to 3 targets. Projectile redirects to nearby mobs if the first target dies.
  • BUFF Poison — Can now kill monsters instead of leaving them at 1 HP. A fundamental shift for Fire/Poison viability.
  • NEW Thunderbolt — Now includes a stun chance on hit.
🏹
Bowman SKILLS CONFIRMED
Hunter (6 skills) · Crossbowman (5 skills)
  • BUFF Double Shot — Now targets multiple enemies by default. Splits damage across nearby mobs.
  • BUFF Power Knockback — Near 100% knockback chance at max level. Transformed into a reliable utility skill.
  • BUFF Melee Range Shooting — Mastery now allows firing arrows even when monsters are at melee range. No more "whacking" animation.
  • NERF Jump Shot — Traditional jump shot mechanic removed or non-functional. Positional freedom reduced.
🗡️
Thief SKILLS CONFIRMED
Assassin (5 skills) · Bandit (6 skills)
  • REWORK Dark Sight — Converted from timed buff to permanent toggle skill. Significant QoL improvement for positioning.
  • BUFF Drain (Assassin) — Deals surprisingly high damage, sometimes rivalling or exceeding Lucky Seven, while simultaneously healing the caster.
  • SPECULATED Bandit / Savage Blow — Community and playtesters speculate Bandits are among the strongest classes due to Savage Blow's positioning and high multiplier output.
Economic Architecture

A Predictable, Controlled
Economic Foundation

Trade taxes, NPC prices, drop tables, and scroll availability have all been restructured to establish a healthier meso ecosystem from the ground up.

Flat Trade Tax
All player-to-player trades now carry a flat 5% tax, regardless of the amount transferred. The old scaling system (e.g., 4% on 100M = 4M taken out) has been removed for predictability.
NPC Economy Restructure
Equipment sell prices drastically reduced to prevent meso flooding — e.g., Purple Goon Shoes: 50,000 mesos → 6,600 mesos. However, equipment is cheaper to buy from shops — Fusion Mace: 22,000 → 13,500 mesos.

NPCs now have a Buyback tab for accidentally sold items. Potions remain at similar costs.
Scroll System — Completely Redesigned DATAMINED
The classic 10%/60%/100% scroll system has been entirely replaced with a new 4-tier system: Lesser (100%, +1 stat) → Intermediate (60%, +2 stat) → Greater (10%, +3 stat) → Chaos (10%, +5 stat, destroys item on fail).

Scroll Fusion: Lesser scrolls link to itemID1/2/3 pointing to higher tiers — confirming a scroll upgrade/fusion mechanic where you combine lower scrolls into higher tiers. 216 total scrolls covering all equipment slots + pet equipment.

Playtest sources also noted NPC-sold 100% weapon scrolls (35k mesos) and KPQ-reward Iron for STR 60% scrolls — these may coexist with the new tier system as "Lesser" equivalents.
Monster HP & Drop Tables
Mobs (excluding low-level ones) have roughly 50% less HP across the board. Drop tables have been fully reshuffled — equipment drops adjusted, ore drops unchanged.

XP rebalancing: Level 9–32 mobs grant more XP; Level 33–60 mobs grant less; Level 61–75 mobs grant much less.
Storage Expansion
Default storage expanded to 48 slots — a massive quality of life improvement from the original 4-slot default.
Beginners & Travel
Beginners retain the 90% meso discount from NPCs.

Victoria Island cabs now offer two-way travel to Sleepywood, eliminating the old "noob trap" where players could get stranded.
Monetisation Philosophy VERIFIED
Inkwell confirmed: no Cubes planned. The datamine now proves this from the game files — zero cube items exist in the entire consumable database. Zero starforce items. Zero flames. The potentialCostTable.img exists but is a dead remnant.

Gachapon is still being discussed — specifically whether obtainable items constitute pay-to-win. NX is permanent with no expiry. Cash Shop item data was not present in the WZ metadata dump. Community's #1 fear remains P2W monetisation.
Classic World Exclusives DATAMINED

"Classic Plus" Is Real —
Brand New Content Nobody Expected

The datamine confirms this is not a museum restoration. 10 new monsters, 17 new maps, a new field boss, and a crafting system that never existed in any prior version of MapleStory.

Shallow Passage
12 Maps · Accessible from Sleepywood
  • Forgotten Hollow — hub town with Cave Fairy NPCs
  • Cave Fairy Sanctuary — services & shops
  • Cave Fairy Department Store
  • Primeval Forest I-III — field maps
  • Forgotten Entrance I-III — dungeon maps
  • The End of Fleeting Light — deep area
  • Forgotten Dungeon Tunnel
  • Forbidden Entrance — connects to Deep Passage
Deep Passage
5 Maps · The "Endgame" Area
  • Perilous Descent I-III — vertical descent maps
  • Decayed Tunnel I — tunnel area
  • Bygone Days — the final map (nostalgia theme)
With no Zakum or Horntail maps...
The highest-tier bosses appear to be Rotten Mushmom (ID 700003) and Jr. Balrog (ID 700001). "Bygone Days" may contain an unrevealed endgame boss.
10 Brand-New Monsters — Never Seen Before

Plus 4 "Super" mobs (IDs 90-93): Super Jr. Necki, Super Slime, Super Ribbon-Pig, Super Stirge — likely PQ or event variants.

Redesigned Scroll System — 4 Tiers
Lesser
100%
+1 stat
Always succeeds
Base tier
Intermediate
60%

High risk

Chaos
10%
+5 stat
Destroys on fail
cursed: 100

Lesser scrolls link to itemID1, itemID2, itemID3 — pointing to Intermediate, Greater, and Chaos versions. This confirms a scroll fusion/upgrade path where you combine lower-tier scrolls into higher tiers. 216 total scrolls covering all equipment slots including pet equipment.

Arcforger Crafting System — Brand New
🔨
Nyroth (Arcforger)
Located in the Shallow Passage / Cave Fairy area — a new crafting NPC with no equivalent in any prior version
🔨
Chrishrama (Arcforger)
Located in Sleepywood — another crafting NPC, suggesting the system spans multiple areas
⚗️
Eurek the Alchemist
Sleepywood alchemist NPC — part of the new crafting infrastructure alongside Arcforgers
🧚
Cave Fairy NPCs
Zelya, Myen, Myra, Luma (Grocer), Riel, Roel, Rael (shopkeepers), Pison (Tour Guide), plus Cave Fairy's Storage
💡
Nobody asked for any of this — but it extends the endgame. The Shallow/Deep Passage adds a progression path beyond what early MapleStory ever had. The Arcforger crafting system could fill the gear progression gap left by the absence of Zakum/Horntail drops. Community has been generally open to "tasteful new content" that fits the classic aesthetic.
Systemic Overhaul

Eradicating Degenerate
Legacy Loops

HP Washing, passive leeching, and statless builds — the three pillars of old Maple's broken meta — have been systematically removed or made obsolete.

HP Washing — Completely Removed
Inkwell explicitly stated: "HP Washing was more of a bug back in the day than a feature." It has been entirely removed from Classic World. This was one of the most community-requested changes and one of the least controversial developer decisions.
Statless Builds — Effectively Dead
Dexless / Lukless / Strless builds no longer function as viable meta paths. Equipment requirements and stat distributions have been shuffled to reward normal stat investment and gear progression.
Character Creation — No More Dice
The creation stat dice roll is removed. Stats are automatically assigned from Level 1–10, then reset on first job advancement. Players can allocate AP in bulk amounts rather than one click at a time.
Song of Solomon — Alt Progression
New consumable items granting 500 XP each — obtainable from quests (e.g., Olaf's Job Advancement gives 10 Songs of Solomon). These can be transferred through storage to level alt characters.
The 10-Second Activity Rule
Players receive zero party XP if they have not performed an action (attacking a monster or using a skill) in the last 10 seconds. A mage teleporting was still considered active. Leeching as a dominant playstyle is effectively eradicated.
Party Bonus XP — Massively Buffed
+25% 2 Players
(was +10%)
+55% 3 Players
(was +15%)
+90% 4 Players
(was +20%)
Developer Insights

Inkwell Speaks —
Maple Con 2025

Dino Fry (YouTube) sat down with Han Bil O (Inkwell), Head of Western Development at Nexon, for a 30-minute exclusive interview at the MapleStory 20th Anniversary celebration.

On the origin of Classic World
Inkwell said the idea came to him around the time of the Big Bang update — about 10 years before the project entered active development. He brought it to Nexon then, but they weren't interested. He brought it up again ~4 years ago, development started 2–3 years ago.
Why not just play private servers?
"If you want to play MapleStory Classic World right now, you already can" — Inkwell acknowledged private servers exist. The official version's goal is to add QoL that modern players expect while still keeping it classic — not just a raw replication.
On HP Washing
Inkwell brought up HP Washing unprompted, saying: "HP Washing was more of a bug back in the day than a feature." He made clear it will not be in Classic World and that the monetisation model won't depend on it.
On cubes and gachapon
No plans for Cubes. Gachapon is still being discussed — Inkwell compared it to PSSB (cosmetics-only loot boxes in modern GMS) and was careful to note it depends on what items gachapon would contain. He wants to avoid pay-to-win by definition.
On the content timeline and what comes after launch
Ludibrium and El Nath are already in development or nearly complete. But the timeline won't follow original GMS order. Like Spider-Verse: Classic World will diverge. "What if the Black Mage didn't die?" Future content tracks what players ask for — not what the original game did.
On new classes
The possibility is open. Inkwell's answer: "What do the players want?" If there's demand, he'll consider it. Player feedback is the north star for every major content decision.
🍁
Inkwell
Han Bil O · Head of Western Development, Nexon
Interview: October 25, 2025 · Maple Con
Started playing MapleStory in 2003–2004 during the open beta. Was ranked in the top 60 Warriors on the Zenith server in Korean MapleStory.
Played a Fighter with a two-handed sword — before third job was even released.
Conceived Classic World around the time of the Big Bang update — approximately a decade before active development began.
Philosophy: "We're not reviving old school Maple Story. It's a modernised classic" — accessible to ages 20s through 40s.
Feels MapleStory's unique appeal is pixel art — timeless aesthetic that transcends generations of players.
Confirmed: "We're ready to release Classic World right now" — playtests first, feedback shapes what comes next.
On unfinished lore: "We never got to tell Mani's story. What happened to Chief Stan in Henesys?" Classic World will revisit and expand unexplored narratives.
Community Telemetry

High Approval for Meta Shifts,
High Anxiety over Inflation

Reddit (r/MSClassicWorld, r/Maplestory) consensus, synthesised from community discussions ahead of and during the LA playtest period.

01
Do not preserve HP Washing. The community is overwhelmingly positive about its removal. Seen as a legacy bug, a monetisation-driven mistake, and fundamentally unfair. Multiple r/Maplestory threads cite it as a dealbreaker for return players.
STRONG +
02
Leeching removal is welcomed. The 10-second activity rule gets strong support. Community consensus: leeching was dominant and "degenerate" — it should not be preserved for authenticity's sake.
STRONG +
03
Statless builds are dead — mostly OK. Some players mourn the loss of Dexless/Lukless build identity. Others are relieved that character progression will be more diverse and less gear-path-converging.
MIXED
04
Attack Power vs Weapon Attack confusion. Multiple Reddit threads argue the naming is backwards — community intuition says WA should come from weapons, not buffs. The renaming has generated significant discussion.
CONCERN
05
Economy & inflation anxiety. The most persistent long-term worry: meso generation outpacing meaningful sinks. "If mesos stop mattering, trading breaks." Stronger meso sinks are frequently requested.
HIGH ANXIETY
06
Bandit/Shadower speculation. Reddit class theory suggests Bandits may be strong under the new math due to Savage Blow's positioning and multiplier. But the community acknowledges old intuitions may not transfer cleanly.
THEORY
07
Power creep at low levels. Concern that overpowered early-game items could trivialise progression — the same mistake that eroded early-game satisfaction in original GMS.
CONCERN
08
Community wants "classic feeling," not "classic inconvenience." The strongest meta-consensus: QoL is welcome. But the game should preserve the pacing, exploration, and social texture of old Maple — not the grind frustration.
CONSENSUS
Community Sentiment Gauges
HP Washing Removal 92%
Anti-Leech Rule 85%
Statless Build Removal 58%
Economy Inflation Anxiety 78%
Early-Game Power Creep Fear 65%
Monetisation Confidence 55%
Datamined Reality Check VERIFIED
Community gets what they want: No cubes, no starforce, no flames, no link skills, no union/legion, Free Market with 11 channels, KPQ confirmed, manual AP allocation — all verified in game data.

Modified vs expectations: Scroll system completely redesigned (not the classic 10%/60%/100%). Cash Shop data not in WZ dump (unknown). Phased content strongly implied — starting at 2nd job is earlier than most expected.

Missing: Only 2nd job (community expected at least 3rd). No Zakum/Horntail (no maps). No Ossyria. No Ludibrium/Orbis PQs. Balance changes unknown from metadata alone.
Source Note
Community data from Reddit, Steam, MMOBomb, DigitalTQ, MassivelyOP, maplestoryclassicworld.com, and MapleCon 2025 press. Datamined data from WZ metadata dump (3,859 files, 416 MB). Sentiment gauges are community-derived approximations — not official surveys.
World & Lore

Charting an Unexplored
Chronological Timeline

Victoria Island gets new zones. The datamine reveals 304 total maps across Maple Island (25), Victoria Island (240), instances (24), and events (15). A parallel lore framework opens doors that original GMS never walked through.

Map Changes Summary
Shallow Passage DATAMINED
12 maps · Forgotten Hollow, Cave Fairy Sanctuary, Primeval Forest I-III, Forbidden Entrance
Deep Passage DATAMINED
5 maps · Perilous Descent I-III, Decayed Tunnel, Bygone Days — the endgame area
Florina Road DATAMINED
6 maps · Florina Beach, Lorang/Clang area — present in game data despite playtest absence
Forest of Golems
Absent in all playtests
Monkey Forest 2
Absent in all playtests
Ludibrium
In development · Not following original GMS order
El Nath
In development · Ready when players want it
Hidden Streets — No Yellow Glow
Hidden Streets will no longer display the yellow portal glow effect, preserving the sense of discovery and mystery that made exploring Victoria Island memorable.
Player Inspection
You can now hover over other players' equipment to see their stats and applied scrolls in a tooltip window. Social and competitive transparency without disrupting gameplay.
Bob the Snail Returns
The legendary Green Snail is back — but without a name tag and unable to spawn other Green Snails. A nod to classic community lore.
The Parallel Lore Framework
Classic World is not just a gameplay server — it's a narrative fork. Developers plan to explore stories never told in original GMS:

• NPC Mani — Her story was never told. Classic World will give it space.
• Chief Stan — What happened in Henesys? A mystery the original game never resolved.
• The Hero's Gladius — An artefact with untold lore.
• The Black Mage — "What if he didn't die?" A future narrative thread left open.
Party Quests & Channels
Party quests are instanced. There may be a channel limit on how many parties can enter simultaneously. A new Party Search feature can auto-invite similarly-levelled players. Loot distribution settings are now configurable per party.

61424 Hr Mobile StoreWe have everything except the ones we don't have~, Alright, everyone come check it out!
402AlexAh... I'm bored...
414AndreOh no no no no no~~!! YOU need a haircut!!, I may not be as good as the Don, but I'm close enough~
224AnneWhen's Mom coming? She must be busy..., I can only do this by myself for so long...
800010Anvil
800015Arcane Station
509ArturoI made this potion myself!!, Hey, you! No stealing around here...
304Arwen the FairyAh... my precious collection ... where are they???, I don't want to ask humans for a favor ... but ... there's no choice.
900006Arwen the FairyIt seems the entrance to the Forgotten Hollow has been discovered near Sleepywood., I don't want to ask humans for a favor... but... there's no choice.

14BariWorking hard there~
308BettyHey, if you got some time, can you help me out here
12BiggsHmm...looks like I'm still the best looking man in this town., Hey you! What are you looking at! If you're admiring at my good looks, might as well say it!!, One of these days, I'll be the one operating that huge ship, and take off to a far bigger land...
501BlackbullHaven't seen you before...better be careful around here., Don't worry, we aren't cannibals here...*gulp*, Don't you like my hair? It's very popular around town.
616Bluebell Bud
706Bluebell Bud
227Bowman Job InstructorDo you want to make the 2nd job advancement as the bowman? Go see "Athena Pierce" of Henesys first., Only the ones that pass my test can make the 2nd job advancement as the bowman.
800003Bowman Job InstructorDo you want to make the 2nd job advancement as the bowman? Go see "Athena Pierce" of Henesys first., Only the ones that pass my test can make the 2nd job advancement as the bowman.
216BrittanyI'm Brittany the assistant, in charge of dying hair..., Natalie is my mother and the owner of this place.
206Bruce
204Camila
228CaseyYou tired of hunting? How about playing a minigame, Still no one to beat me...I'm the master of minigames...
704Cave Fairy’s Storage
106ChefWho am I? Well...who AM I, If you have a secret scroll by any chance, would you mind showing that to me
202Chief StanWhere did my son go..., Hey, you! I strongly suggest you don't do anything stupid around this town...
415ChrisDo you have a raw ore of a mineral or a jewel by any chance? Allow me to do the rest for you..., Phew ... I'm tired. I'll rest up a little bit for now.
602ChrishramaYou need something...
900014Chun JiDon't talk to me..., Leave now...before you get hurt, Are you telling me I'm worse than Man Ji??
800001ClotoYou need to answer my question in order to move on to the next level., The difficulty of this problem depends on how you relate to one another.
219CloyDo you have any questions about pets? Ask me anything about them..., Are you raising a pet? If you have any questions, feel free to ask
610Crumbling Statue
408Cutthroat MannyYou need a weapon? Our store specializes in weapons for thieves..., Alright! Pick and choose!
511Dances with BalrogDo you want to become a warrior, For those that want to become a warrior, come see me...
411Dark LordTo those that want to be a thief, come...
213Denma the OwnerDo you want to have plastic surgery? Let me take care of you then..., It's not a bad idea to change your face up every once in a while
413Don GiovanniHey, you! You seem to be having a bad-hair day...how about letting me take care of it??, Hahahah! Welcome to my hair salon! Have a seat!
409Don HwangHello there, do you need something, There is no way in the world you're going to overpay for an item here~
209DoofusPet food for your precious pet!! On Sale!!, Do you need to get some food for your pet
615Door of Dimension
410Dr. FaymusYou need potions? Here you go...I have PLENTY!!, Here! Pick and choose!!
214Dr. FeebleI've been wearing these for so long, I can barely see what's in front of me now..., Ah ... you want a plastic surgery? Cough cough ..., Plastic surgery ... allow me to handle it ... haha ... by the way, where is the face ... ?
318El MothI can make scrolls easily!, I know exactly what kind of scrolls you want.
300EstelleIt's not easy to make a new sauce., No, this is not it! I need a distinctive flavor.
605Eurek the Alchemist
419Exit
310Flora the FairyWelcome to Ellinia~, I have many good available here. Come check them out!
303FrancoisDo you need anything..., Here...I have some goods here, so come take a look at them!
800008Fredrick
800007Free Market Maple TV
321Fully Bloomed Bluebell
705Fully Bloomed Bluebell
313Grendel the Really OldTo all that desire to become a magician...talk to me...
900005Grendel the Really OldIt seems a massive underground cave, long forgotten, has been discovered…
508HarryLet's see...I'm ready for some work here!, Hello everyone! I've got some fiiine goods for ya!, I will never let go of the thieves trying to steal things here.
1HeenaBeautiful day today!, Press left Alt key and you'll be able to jump., Press the arrow keys to move around here and there.
606Hotel ReceptionistHello. Welcome to Sleepywood Hotel, Please use our hotel if you want to regain your health.
407Icarus...
401JM From tha StreetzHmm... can I see you for a sec ..., Hmm ... the items you may need ... I have them all.
417JakeDo you want in? Then please purchase a ticket here., No one is allowed in without a ticket.
103JaneI wanna travel too..., Why does my dad not want me to travel around
412Jane Doe
205Jay
100JohnHow about buying one of these fishes, I used to be an adventurer myself...but now I don't mind living a normal life..., You don't need to be that scared of it. I've walked away from that lifestyle long ago.
210KarlReally cheap around here!!!, Come check it out! Ahahahah!!
800000LakelisDo you want to combine powers of your party members to solve this quest, There are lots of obstacles here where the only way you'll pass is by joining forces with your party members.
900008LakelisDo you want to combine powers of your party members to solve this quest, There are lots of obstacles here where the only way you'll pass is by joining forces with your party members.
800014Leatherworking Station
312Len the FairyDo you need potions by any chance? I have plenty in store..., If you want to return to Ellinia at will, then try buying the return scroll to this place.
314LouisIf you want to leave this place, come talk to me.
17LucasStranger...what are you doing here, I'm not too fond of the strangers. I'm only worried about the peace of this town., You...if you're strong and powerful, can you take care of the monsters around town
21LucyOk, cheap goods! Really cheap!!, Hey you!! Don't even think about stealing in here..., You definitely need potions to travel
226Lukezzz..., ... ... ... zzz..., This is the way to the ... dun ... geon ... zzzzzzzz ....
700Luma
212LunaYawn, I'm tired... just go choose an item you want ...
319Magician Job InstructorDo you want to make the 2nd job advancement as the magician? Go see "Grendel the Really Old" of Ellinia first., Only the ones that pass my test can make the 2nd job advancement as the magician.
800004Magician Job InstructorDo you want to make the 2nd job advancement as the magician? Go see "Grendel the Really Old" of Ellinia first., Only the ones that pass my test can make the 2nd job advancement as the magician.
11MaiDo you know me by any chance? You don't? What's wrong with you, If you are thinking of challenging me, I suggest you keep dreaming..., Is there anyone that can satisfy my desire to fight...
502Manji..., Don't talk to me., Leave now...or you'll get hurt.
800016Maple AdministratorI can tell you more about the Truth Booth if you want., Be careful not to end up in the Truth Booth.
900000Maple AdministratorHello, there! How's the traveling, Would you like to change your job
900001Maple AdministratorHello, there! How's the traveling, Would you like to change your job
9010000Maple AdministratorAre you enjoying the sights of Maple World, Feel free to talk to me anytime if you need my help.
900009MapleCon TV
317Mar the FairyDid your pet turned back into a doll by any chance, If you have an unmoving pet with you, please take it to me.
10MariaAhh...I need to get this letter sent...
207MayaCough, cough...
900003MayaCough, cough... Welcome to MapleCon…, There’s said to be a place called Someone Else’s House in Henesys. Have you heard of it
513Mikezzz..., ... ... ... zzz..., This is the way to the...dun...geon...zz.zzzzzz....
109MinaLow price! Really loooow!, Whoa there, no stealing around here!!!, It's a must that you get some potions if you want to go on a journey.
404Mong from KongHey...are you logged on at Internet Cafe? Then come in..., It's an Internet Cafe right here, but not everyone can go in...
111Mr. GoldsteinHey, there! Is your buddy list full by any chance, If you need to expand your buddy list, how about doing some business with me? Harharhar...
405Mr. HongYou need a place to store your items and mesos? Here it is!, My storage is safe and secure, so no worries!
105Mr. KimYou need a place to store your items and mesos? This is just the place for you!, My storage is safe and secure, so no worries!
220Mr. LeeYou need a place to store your items and mesos? This is just the place for you!, My storage is safe and secure, so no worries!
604Mr. OhYou need a place to store your items and mesos? This is just the place for you!, My storage is safe and secure, so no worries!
307Mr. ParkYou need a place to store your items and mesos? This is just the place for you!, My storage is safe and secure, so no worries!
900015Mr. PickallThere is no lock in the world that I can't pick...!
607Mr. SweatbottomA few minutes in sauna, and you'll feel much better. What do you think? Already working for you, If you need an item, I have some available, so go take a look...
503Mr. ThunderThere is nothing in this world that I can't make...hahah!, Do you have a jewel or a mineral by any chance? Show me then!
505Mr. WangYou need a place to store your items and mesos? This is just the place for you!, My storage is safe and secure, so no worries!
608Mr. WetbottomAh... you're using the VIP sauna. What do you think? Do you want to make a deal with me
203Mrs. Ming Ming
217Ms. TanThese days, everyone wants to tan their skin..., There's nothing as healthy-looking as a well-tanned skin. What do you think? Do you want to tan it like me, Every once in a while, someone comes along that wants a clean, white skin. That's ok, too.
702Myen
703Myra
609Mysterious Statue
215NatalieYou like my hairstyle? We hairdressers are supposed to keep up with the latest trends, you know, Are you tired of your hairdo? Here, let me make it look nice and pretty for you...
900007NatalieYou like my hairstyle? We hairdressers are supposed to keep up with the latest trends, you know, Want to customize your character to your heart’s content? Then come talk to me!
108NatashaLet's see...I'm ready to start doing some business here..., Welcome everyone! I've got some goods you will definitely be interested in...!, Anyone that steals will feel my wrath!!!
406NellaMan, I'm soooo busy! Anyone around here willing to help, Strangers walking around everywhere here today.
800002NellaIf you want to leave this place, come talk to me., You can always get out of here through me.
4NinaWhat would be good for dinner
707Nyroth
107OlafHuh? Hey you come here!, Look at me~ Do you want to be strong like me
16PanLet's see...I'm ready to make some money..., Hello everyone! I've got some goods here for sale!!, Anyone that steals will not go unpunished!!
112PasonDo you want to head over to Florina Beach, There's a gorgeous beach called Florina Beach near Victoria Island...
900010PaulWhere's my brother..., I need to get to where the event takes place...
6PeterYou should train yourself well before going on the journey., Well done getting here!, This is the exit to the Mushroom Town.
101PhilOpen your item inventory and you'll find equip., use, set-up, and etc. and cash tabs., The item you pick up is automatically stored in an appropriate item category. What do you think? Isn't it cool, Double-click on an item in the item inventory and you'll be able to use it
218PiaI wanna do something..., Ahhhh...it's trying to eat me!!, Ahh...I like it...sooo comfortable...
900013PietraClick me and you'll go back to where you were., Come back for another event.
900012PietroCome talk to me, if you're one of those that won the prizes.
18PioDo you need my help by any chance? I can handle machinery really well..., I just ate a little bit ago...and yet I'm hungry already...!!, Phew...work is hard. I need to take a break.
801PisonThis is Florina Beach!, If you want to head back to where you were before, feel free to talk to me.
804RaelWelcome to Florina Beach~!, Aren't we hot
19RainIsn't it nice out here today, To jump, press the left Alt key., Press the arrow keys to move around here and there.
200Regular Cab
301Regular Cab
400Regular Cab
500Regular Cab
600Regular Cab
802RielWelcome to Florina Beach~!, Aren't we hot
201RinaHave you met up with Athena Pierce, the one that watches over and takes care of our town, If you want to become a bowman, please go see Athena Pierce, who resides in the inner part of the park., Hmm...is Ronnie doing well? I can't find him...I was thinking of fixing him a nice plate of Unagi.
507RiverCheap~! Sooo cheap!!, Come check it out!! Hahahah
8RobinBe careful! You'll see monsters around here., Press 'Ctrl' to attack the monster., Press Z and you'll be able to pick up the item the monster drops., If it's a powerful monster, how about teaming up with someone else
803RoelWelcome to Florina Beach~!, Aren't we hot
3RogerOpen your item inventory and you'll find equip., use, set-up, etc. and cash tabs., The item you pick up is automatically stored in an appropriate item category. What do you think? Isn't it cool, Double-click on an item in the item inventory and you'll be able to use it.
320RonnieI... actually snuck out with my dad's book., I'm still a kid so I don't know much... but what exactly is in this book
305Rowen the FairyDo you think my friend Ronnie is doing well..., Deep in the forest, Zombie Lupin's are threatening the safety of our town ..., A few days ago, my friend Arwen lost her red heart-shaped earrings in the middle of the forrest owned by Shane ...
603SabitramaI'm collecting herbs...
900004SabitramaI'm collecting herbs..., Do you have any desire to challenge the Forest of Patience, hidden deep within Ellinia
9SamYou can be even stronger, if you get a lesson from Mai., Go to the right and then you can meet bunch of other people., Press "w" to see the current position., How about partying with other players
211SamHmm...I'm ready for business now..., Ahem, I only deal with the finest of all items...
800009Scrooge
5SenI'm... so ... hungry!, Can... I... eat this ...
2SeraIt's a neverending pile of laundry I'll be hanging around here., Have you met my sister Heena before, Just press the up arrow, and you can climb the ladder or rope., Click on us to start a chat!
311Serabi the FairyWe sell various kinds of armors here..., Come take a look.
800012Sewing Machine
306ShaneAre you here at the request of Sabitrama, I heard there's an incredible herb that can be found in here...but I can't just let you easily like that..., Not everyone can enter this place~
15ShanksI am the captain, dang it!! Don't be looking down on me!, I'll take you anywhere you want
403ShumiOh no... where could it be ...??, Crap~~!! I lost my money!!!!, I hope someone can help me out ...
20SidOn sale! Really CHEAP!, Welcome!! Hahahaha!
504Silas IronsI'm Mr. Thunder's apprentice., If you need something made, just come find me.
110SilverOn Sale!! Crazy Prices!!!, Come check it out!! Hahahahah!
510SophiaOk...I'm ready to do business..., It's so boring around here..., Is Maya getting better from her sickness
102TeoHey, have you seen a whale around here? Hmmm... where did it go ..., Haven't been able to shave in months ... now my chin is starting to itch like crazy, The incredible feeling of sailing along the beautiful coast ... that's what life is all about!
418The Ticket Gate
424Thief Job InstructorDo you want to make the 2nd job advancement as the thief? Go see "Dark Lord" of Kerning City first., Only the ones that pass my test can make the 2nd job advancement as the thief.
800005Thief Job InstructorDo you want to make the 2nd job advancement as the thief? Go see "Dark Lord" of Kerning City first., Only the ones that pass my test can make the 2nd job advancement as the thief
7ToddWatch out for the monsters, You can attack the monsters, if you press "Ctrl"., You can pick up the items, if you press "z"., If the monsters are strong, how about making a party with other players
222Trainer BartosWhat? Your pet turned into a doll? Of course... it's originally a doll that came to life through a special magic., Hehehe ... if you need to train your pet, I'll take care of it...
223Trainer FrodHmmm ... my brother keeps making me do these dumb assignments ..., Taking a walk around town with your pet...isn't that the best feeling in the world??
420Treasure Chest
421Treasure Chest
422Treasure Chest
416TulcusIf you need any scrolls, come talk to me., It's a piece of cake for me to make scrolls, you know.

Consumable3x EXP Coupon (15 min)Double-click to receive a 3x EXP buff for 15 minutes.\r \r Effect does not stack with similar event ...
ConsumableCompanion’s Magic BoxA box locked away with a powerful magical lock. Apparently there are jewels inside.
ConsumableGift for the New JourneyDouble-click to obtain the below items. - Leaf Points 10,000 Exchange Coupon x5 - Regular Store Per...
ConsumableLeaf Points (1000) Exchange CouponDouble-click to get 1,000 Leaf Points.
ConsumableLie Detector TestCan be used on suspected botters. Usable only when a suspect is hunting.
ConsumableNatalie's Fashion Box(F)A box with a variety of outfits recommended by Natalia.
ConsumableNatalie's Fashion Box(M)A box with a variety of outfits recommended by Natalia.
ConsumableRainbow-colored Snail ShellA special shell only found through Mano. Apparently it's powerful enough to grant a wish...
ConsumableThe Songs of SolomonAn ancient collection of poems and life lessons from various elders, sages and warriors in the Maple...
FoodPet FoodSmall pets love them. Restores 30 Fullness. Can be purchased in town General Stores or some town Pet...
GemPet Ability Transfer ScrollA scroll required for transferring a pet’s level. Bring this scroll to Mar the Fairy in Mar’s Forest...
Gem OreOctopus & Mushroom Omok SetA set that allows you to play Omok. Uses octopus and mushroom-shaped figures for the game.
Gem OrePig & Mushroom Omok SetA set that allows you to play Omok. Uses pig and mushroom-shaped figures for the game.
Gem OrePig & Octopus Omok SetA set that allows you to play Omok. Uses pig and octopus-shaped figures for the game.
Gem OreSet of Match CardsA set that allows you to play Match Cards.
Gem OreSlime & Mushroom Omok SetA set that allows you to play Omok. Uses slime and mushroom-shaped figures for the game.
Gem OreSlime & Octopus Omok SetA set that allows you to play Omok. Uses slime and octopus-shaped figures for the game.
Gem OreSlime & Pig Omok SetA set that allows you to play Omok. Uses pig and slime-shaped figures for the game.
IngotEquipment Crafting StimulatorWhen used while crafting equipment, there is a chance to randomize the item's bonus stats.
IngotScroll Crafting StimulatorWhen used while crafting scrolls, there is a chance to produce an Intermediate, Greater, or Chaos sc...
Metal OreAdamantium IngotA heavy, strong, refined adamantium.
Metal OreAdamantium OreThe ore of a heavy, strong adamantium.
Metal OreBronze IngotA light, weak, refined bronze.
Metal OreBronze OreThe ore of a light and weak bronze.
Metal OreGold IngotA very rare, refined gold.
Metal OreGold OreThe ore of gold, a very rare mineral.
Metal OreIron IngotA tough, refined iron.
Metal OreIron OreThe ore of a tough iron.
Metal OreMithril IngotA solid, light, refined mithril.
Metal OreMithril OreThe ore of a light, solid mithril.
Metal OreMoon RockA glittering mineral that possesses the mysterious power of the moon.
Metal OreOrihalcon IngotA very rare, refined orihalcon.
Metal OreOrihalcon OreThe ore of orihalcon, a very rare mineral.
Metal OreSilver IngotA shiny, refined silver.
Metal OreSilver OreThe ore of a shiny silver.
Monster Drop"Blackbull's" deed to the landA lost deed to the land for "Blackbull" of Perion.
Monster DropAncient ScrollA scroll from long ago that contains powerful, mysterious magic from then.
Monster DropAnimal Fur BundleA small bundle of animal fur. Soft and light, it looks like it could drift away at any moment.
Monster DropAqumander TailA tail removed from an Aqumander.
Monster DropArwen's Glass ShoesA shiny glass shoes for women only.
Monster DropBlack DyeA black dye used to dye items black when crafting certain items.
Monster DropBlue DyeA blue dye used to dye items blue when crafting certain items.
Monster DropBlue Mushroom CapA cap removed from a mushroom.
Monster DropBlue Snail ShellA shell removed from a snail.
Monster DropBubbling's Huge BubbleA huge bubble removed from a Bubbling.
Monster DropCharm of the UndeadA charm taken from an undead monster.
Monster DropClang ClawA huge piece of claw cut off of a Clang.
Monster DropCoconutA fresh coconut made in Florina Beach.
Monster DropCold Eye TailA tail removed from a lizard.
Monster DropCouponA coupon earned by taking down a monster. Can be traded for a pass.
Monster DropCroco SkinA very solid and tough piece of skin from a Croco.
Monster DropCurse Eye TailA tail removed from a lizard.
Monster DropCursed DollA cursed doll possessed by a Zombie Lupin.
Monster DropDark Nependeath SeedA seed cut out of a Dark Nependeath. It's poisonous and covered with thorns, so it should be handled...
Monster DropDark Stone Golem RubbleMystic rubble that was a part of a Dark Stone Golem.
Monster DropDecayed CharmAn old and putrid charm taken from a rotting undead monster.
Monster DropDragon SkinA solid piece of dragon's skin that gives off a mysterious light.
Monster DropDrake SkullIt's the skull of a Drake.
Monster DropDuskmander TailA tail removed from a Duskmander.
Monster DropEchopus LegA leg removed from a glowing octopus.
Monster DropEvent TrophyA souvenir for entering the event. Made out of gold, so you can sell it for a high price.
Monster DropEvil Eye TailA tail removed from a lizard.
Monster DropFairy WingA piece of wing from a fairy. It's soft and brittle, so it should be handled with care.
Monster DropFairy's TentacleA tentacle removed from a Fairy. Very small and delicate, so it should be handled with care.
Monster DropFire Boar's ToothA canine tooth taken from a Fire Boar.
Monster DropFirewoodA high quality piece of firewood from an Axe Stump.
Monster DropFlaming FeatherA flame with the look of a feather. It never stops burning.
Monster DropFragment of MagicThe source of magical power once possessed by a monster. A mysterious energy can be felt.
Monster DropGiant Tree's BoughA bough broken off of a huge tree.
Monster DropGiant Tree's Rotten BoughA bough broken off of a huge, decaying tree.
Monster DropGlowing Mushroom SporeThe spore of a glowing mushroom.
Monster DropGolden Stirge WingA wing cut off of a Golden Stirge, a small bat glowing with golden light.
Monster DropGreen Mushroom CapA cap removed from a mushroom.
Monster DropHorny Mushroom CapA cap removed from a mushroom.
Monster DropIron Hog's Metal HoofA metal hoof that covered the legs of an Iron Hog.
Monster DropJr. Boogie HornA horn removed from a Jr. Boogie. Small, dense, and hard to break.
Monster DropJr. Necki SkinA piece of skin from a Jr. Necki.
Monster DropJr. Sentinel ShellpieceA hard piece of rock that forms the body of a Jr. Sentinel.
Monster DropLeafA leaf that's taken out of a tree.
Monster DropLeatherAn animal's skin that's been cut away.
Monster DropLigator SkinA very solid and tough piece of skin from a Ligator.
Monster DropLorang ClawA huge piece of claw cut off of a Lorang.
Monster DropLupin DollA miniature figure of a Lupin.
Monster DropLupin's BananaIt's a Lupin's favorite: a tasty banana.
Monster DropMalady's Experimental FrogA bottle containing frogs that a Malady had for various experiments.
Monster DropMedicine With Weird VibesA medicine with weird vibes left by a Wraith.
Monster DropMushmom SporeA spore from Mushmom, a humongous mushroom.
Monster DropMushroom SporeThe spore of a mushroom.
Monster DropNependeath SeedA seed cut out of a Nependeath. It's poisonous, so it shouldn't be taken lightly.
Monster DropOctopus LegA leg removed from an octopus.
Monster DropOld Gold WatchAn old gold watch. An article left by Alex's late mother.
Monster DropOrange Mushroom CapA cap removed from a mushroom.
Monster DropPassA pass earned by trading with a coupon. Can only advance to the next stage with a pass.
Monster DropPiece of IceWater frozen through the power of magic. Doesn't melt easily.
Monster DropPig's HeadA head of a pig.
Monster DropPig's RibbonTaken from a pig with a ribbon.
Monster DropPoisonous MushroomA poisonous mushroom that lives on the humongous Zombie Mushroom.
Monster DropProcessed ClothSoftly processed cloth. Used as a material for crafting various items.
Monster DropProcessed LeatherFinely processed leather. Used as a material for crafting various items.
Monster DropProcessed ParchmentFinely crafted parchment. It is used as a material when creating magic-infused scrolls.
Monster DropProcessed WoodProcessed wood made out of tree branches. Used as a material for crafting various items.
Monster DropRaffle PetalA small petal taken from the bud of a parasitic flower.
Monster DropRafflesia PetalA large petal taken from a fully bloomed parasitic flower.
Monster DropRed DyeA red dye used to dye items red when crafting certain items.
Monster DropRed Snail ShellA shell removed from a snail.
Monster DropRotten Mushmom CapA cap removed from a Rotten Mushmom.
Monster DropScrewA small screw made out of steel. Used as a material for crafting various items.
Monster DropSlime BubbleA bubble removed from a Slime.
Monster DropSnail ShellA shell removed from a snail.
Monster DropSoft FeatherA soft and light feather. Used as a material for crafting various items.
Monster DropSpool of ThreadA thin but durable spool of thread. Used as a material for crafting various items.
Monster DropSquishy LiquidVery thick and sticky liquid.
Monster DropStiff FeatherA feather that's stiff and rough. Used as a material for crafting various items.
Monster DropStirge WingA wing cut off of a Stirge.
Monster DropStone Golem RubbleMystic rubble that was a part of a Stone Golem.
Monster DropTableclothA tablecloth donned by a Jr. Wraith.
Monster DropTauromacis HornA very solid and heavy piece of horn from a Tauromacis.
Monster DropTaurospear HornA very tough and heavy piece of horn from a Taurospear.
Monster DropThe Girl Next DoorA book with a dangerous content.
Monster DropTortie ShellA shell cut off of a Tortie's back.
Monster DropTree BranchA branch bent away from a tree.
Monster DropVIP MirrorA fancily decorated mirror.
Monster DropWhite DyeA white dye used to dye items white when crafting certain items.
Monster DropWild Boar ToothA canine tooth taken from a Wild Boar.
Monster DropWild Kargo EyeAn eye removed from a Wild Kargo.
Monster DropYellow DyeA yellow dye used to dye items yellow when crafting certain items.
PotionAppleA red, ripe, and tasty apple. Recovers around 40 HP.
PotionArcforge KitA set of tools that make arcforge more convenient. Using it increases the amount of crafting skill E...
PotionBlue PotionA potion made out of blue herbs. Recovers 200 MP.
PotionDexterity PotionIncreases Avoidability. Avoidability +5 for 10 min.
PotionDrake's BloodDrake's blood. Attack Power +12 for 5 min.
PotionDrake's MeatDrake's meat. Weapon Def. +10 for 5 min.
PotionEggA nutritious egg. Recovers around 60 HP.
PotionElixirA legendary potion. Restores 35% of HP and MP, but due to its powerful effect, there is a cooldown b...
PotionFairy's HoneyIt's honey, the fairies' favorite. Avoidability +10 for 5 min.
PotionGreen AppleSour and crunchy green apple. Recovers MP +30.
PotionLeatherworking KitA set of tools that make leatherworking more convenient. Using it increases the amount of crafting s...
PotionLemonVery sour. Recovers around 150 MP.
PotionMagic PotionIncreases Magic Attack. Magic Attack +10 for 10 min.
PotionMana ElixirA legendary potion. Restores 50% of MP, but due to its powerful effect, there is a cooldown before i...
PotionMeatA tasty-looking meat. Recovers around 160 HP.
PotionOrangeA sweet, tasty orange. Recovers around 50 MP.
PotionOrange PotionA concentrated potion made out of red herbs. Recovers 250 HP.
PotionPower ElixirA legendary potion. Restores 100% of HP and MP, but due to its powerful effect, there is a cooldown ...
PotionRed PotionA potion made out of red herbs. Recovers 100 HP.
PotionRoger's AppleA ripe, red apple. Recovers HP 30. To eat Roger's Apple, simply double-click on it in your use inve...
PotionSap of Ancient TreeSap of a thousands-of-years-old tree. Magic Attack +12 for 5 min.
PotionSmithing KitA set of tools that make smithing more convenient. Using it increases the amount of crafting skill E...
PotionSniper PotionIncreases Accuracy. Accuracy +5 for 10 min.
PotionSpeed PotionIncreases Speed. Speed +8 for 10 min.
PotionTailoring KitA set of tools that make tailoring more convenient. Using it increases the amount of crafting skill ...
PotionWarrior PotionIncreases Attack Power. Attack Power +10 for 10 min.
PotionWatermelonA very ripe watermelon. Recovers about 800 HP and 800 MP.
PotionWeaponcrafting KitA set of tools that make weaponcrafting more convenient. Using it increases the amount of crafting s...
PotionWhite PotionA highly concentrated potion made out of red herbs. Recovers 500 HP.
PotionWoodcrafting KitA set of tools that make woodcrafting more convenient. Using it increases the amount of crafting ski...
Production MaterialAlligator Skin PouchA pouch made out of alligator skin. Looks sturdy enough to hold on to most anything.
Production MaterialAnimal FossilA fossil of an animal from thousands of years ago.
Production MaterialArcon's BloodA bottle full of Arcon's blood.
Production MaterialAthena Pierce's LetterA letter from Athena Pierce of Henesys. Needs to be shown to the Bowman Job Instructor somewhere aro...
Production MaterialAyan's LetterA letter from Ayan. Must be delievered to Bruce of Henesys.
Production MaterialAyan's Toy SwordA toy sword that Ayan played with growing up.
Production MaterialBartos' LetterA letter from Bartos the instructor. Needs to be delivered to Frod.
Production MaterialBlack FeatherA feather burning in black. So light, it feels like it's going to fly away.
Production MaterialBlue ViolaA blue flower with a huge flower bud.
Production MaterialBroken Mirror GlassA piece of a shattered mirror.
Production MaterialDances with Balrog's LetterA letter from Dances with Balrog of Perion. Needs to be shown to the Warrior Job Instructor somewher...
Production MaterialDark Lord's LetterA letter from Dark Lord of Kerning City. Needs to be shown to the Thief Job Instructor somewhere aro...
Production MaterialDark MarbleA mysterious marble that possesses the dark, ugly nature of the monster.

Production MaterialDark MarbleA mysterious marble that possesses the dark, ugly nature of the monster.

Production MaterialEstelle's Special SauceA special sauce from Estelle of Ellinia. Its ingredients and formulas are all kept secret.
Production MaterialFlying MedicineA fairy medicine made with a collection of rare, hard-to-find ingredients. There's a legend that any...
Production MaterialFossil BoxA wooden box that contains fossils. The cover on the box reads 'WARNING: Handle with CARE.'
Production MaterialFossil ReportDr. Betty's final report on the studies of fossils.
Production MaterialFresh MilkA fresh milk from the fairies. Needs to be delivered to Ronnie.
Production MaterialGlowing MushroomA mushroom gathered near the strange cave entrance.
Production MaterialGrendel the Really Old's LetterA letter from Grendel the Really Old of Ellinia. Needs to be shown to the Magician Job Instructor so...
Production MaterialHero's GladiusA fully reawaken Gladius that a hero has used.
Production MaterialLife ScrollA scroll with unrecognizable ancient characters on it.
Production MaterialLucas' LetterA letter written by Lucas. Needs to be delivered to Mushroom Town's Maria.
Production MaterialMagic BoxA box locked away with a powerful magical lock. Apparently there are jewels inside.
Production MaterialMaria's LetterA letter written by Maria. Needs to be delivered to Lucas of Amherst.
Production MaterialMonster CardThe monster cards needed for the game of Match Cards. Need to have plenty of cards.
Production MaterialOld Gold WatchAn old gold watch. An article left by Alex's late mother.
Production MaterialOld Wooden BoardAn old wooden board from an old, unusable box that has been broken down. Can this be recycled
Production MaterialOminous Rotten BranchA bough broken off a huge, decaying tree. It gives off a foreboding aura.

Production MaterialSecret BookNo one knows what's in this book.

Production MaterialSparkling RockA sparking rock that shines by itself.

Refined MetalAmethystA purple jewel.

ScrollReturn Scroll - Nearest TownReturns you to the nearest town.
ScrollReturn Scroll to ElliniaReturns you to Ellinia.
ScrollReturn Scroll to Forgotten HollowReturns you to Forgotten Hollow.
ScrollReturn Scroll to HenesysReturns you to Henesys.
ScrollReturn Scroll to Kerning CityReturns you to the dark Kerning City.
ScrollReturn Scroll to Lith HarborReturns you to Lith Harbor.
ScrollReturn Scroll to PerionReturns you to Perion.

Status Cure10000 Meso PouchA Meso Pouch containing 10000 Mesos.
Status Cure50000 Meso PouchA Meso Pouch containing 50000 Mesos.
Status CureCakeA cake full of sweetness. Recovers 100 for both HP and MP.
Status CureCiderA cold softdrink. Attack Power +15 for 5 min. Accuracy -5 for 5 min., though.
Status CureDried SquidWell-dried. Recovers 300 HP.
Status CureFat SausageTastes great, and is quite nutritious. Recovers 800 HP.
Status CureFried ChickenWell-fried chicken. Recovers around 120 HP.
Status CureGrape JuiceUsed real grapes for this. Recovers 900 MP.
Status CureHamburgerA hamburger with bulgogi in it. Recovers 500 HP.
Status CureHot DogA hotdog with ketchup on it. Recovers 300 HP.
Status CureHot Dog SupremeA huge hot dog. Recovers 600 HP.
Status CureIce Cream PopA tasty ice cream pop. Recovers around 1500 HP.
Status CureMysterious Meso PouchHow much Meso is in this pouch, anyway
Status CureOrange JuicePure OJ... Recovers 450 MP.
Status CurePizzaA freshly-baked pizza. Recovers 360 HP.
Status CurePure WaterVery clean water. Recovers up to 800 MP.
Status CureRed Bean PorridgeA hot steamy porridge made out of red beans. At an HP-decreasing map, whenever such map damage is de...
Status CureRed Bean SundaeDefinitely lets you forget about the hot hot summer. Recovers around 1500 MP.
Status CureSaladMade out of fresh vegetable. Recovers 200 MP.
Status CureUnagiWell-seasoned eel. Recovers 1000 HP.
Status CureW RamenA cup ramen with awesome soup. Recovers 40% of HP and MP.
TeleportBlack SackIf you think your level's too low, don't bother opening it.
TeleportGM Black Sack: Jr. Balrog LV 80Use to summon Jr. Balrog for the Monster Invasion GM event.
TeleportGM Black Sack: King Slime LV32Use to summon King Slime for the Monster Invasion GM event.
TeleportGM Black Sack: Mano LV20Use to summon Mano for the Monster Invasion GM event.
TeleportGM Black Sack: Mushmom LV40Use to summon Mushmom for the Monster Invasion GM event.
TeleportGM Black Sack: Rotten Mushmom LV60Use to summon Rotten Mushmom for the Monster Invasion GM event.
TeleportGM Black Sack: Zombie Mushmom LV50Use to summon Zombie Mushmom for the Monster Invasion GM event.
MapleClassic

The definitive knowledge base for MapleStory Classic World — now powered by datamined WZ metadata from the actual game client, cross-referenced with developer interviews, LA playtest footage, community analysis, and the engineering blueprint.

Sections
  • Design Philosophy
  • Datamined Intel
  • Blueprint Slides
  • Combat Mechanics
  • Class Changes
  • Economy & QoL
  • New Exclusive Content
  • Progression Systems
  • Developer Interview
  • Community Voice
  • World & Lore
  • Monster Bestiary (83)
  • Equipment Catalog (969)
  • Scroll Database (208)
  • Skill Database (93)
  • Quest Log (174)
  • NPC Directory (188)
  • Crafting Recipes (342)
  • Cash Shop (156)
  • Items Database (332)
Sources
  • WZ Datamine — 3,859 files, 46 archives (Primary)
  • Binary Analysis — MapleStory_0_zucx.exe v1.1.0.0
  • Dino Fry — LA Playtest Breakdown
  • Dino Fry x Inkwell — Maple Con 2025
  • Playtest Class Commentary
  • r/MSClassicWorld Reddit Notes
  • MMOBomb, DigitalTQ, MassivelyOP, MSCW Community
  • MapleStory Parallel Blueprint (PPTX)
  • WZ Datamine — Full Game Database (46 archives)
© 2026 · MapleStory Classic World Fan Documentation · Not affiliated with Nexon
Primary source: WZ Datamine (3,859 files, 416 MB) + Binary Analysis (v1.1.0.0, April 2026) · Cross-referenced with playtests, interviews & community · Blueprint: P-001-CW
